question.label: Commitment closer
question.name: What will you do differently on early alignment before we next meet?
question.description: Closes on a specific behavioral commitment tied to the feedback theme.

answer: I will pick one recent deliverable and write down the decision rule I used before our next check-in.

assessment.note: He named a specific behavioral change—documenting his decision rule on a recent deliverable—which is a concrete positive commitment on clarity with mild growth signal.

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.

I have mostly stayed in my lane instead of forcing cross-team decisions.
I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.
I need explicit expectations for the next cycle so I can calibrate fast.
